personalities.title: YUMMI NUTS
personalities.description: You are always doing something, on the move, or figuring out plans on the fly. You like practical things, but also enjoying the moment. You find simple ways to keep up with your pace, recharge your energy, and go about your day without overcomplicating things.

personalities.title: CAPPY
personalities.description: Your creativity shows up in your routine; you turn the everyday into adventures and always find an authentic way to express yourself. You are a dreamer, spontaneous, and the type to create your own style instead of following rules.

personalities.title: TAQUERITOS
personalities.description: You are intensity, action, and pure next-level energy. You like living fast, making noise, and competing. Gaming, soccer, and intense matches with friends... you always come through to level up everything and everyone.

personalities.title: RANCHITAS
personalities.description: You always find a way to make every moment feel more real and manage to add a crunch to everything. You like to improvise, share, and enjoy without overcomplicating things. Basically, with you, any plan feels more Ranchitas.

personalities.title: ZIBA´S
personalities.description: You make everything feel more authentic, spontaneous, and natural. You like to share with your people and enjoy life without getting bogged down. Your vibe turns any hangout, road trip, or craving into something memorable.

results.title: Your result:
results.shareMessage: I discovered my personality in the Yummies Quiz!

questions.question: Your friends planned a hangout. You always show up with...

options.text: The speaker and the right mood
The best game to play intensely

questions.question: In your backpack, you never leave behind...

options.text: Something to keep me going between chores and routine

questions.question: Your favorite type of movie is:

options.text: Ones with the best plot twists
Comedies to laugh all night long

questions.question: If you had a superpower for 24 hours...

options.text: Recharging your energy at any moment
Bringing everything I imagine to life
Beating every video game in the world
Being able to escape the routine whenever I want
